scripts.bundle:baileys: node -e "require('esbuild').build({entryPoints:['node_modules/@whiskeysockets/baileys/lib/index.js'],bundle:true,platform:'node',format:'cjs',outfile:'generated/baileys-bundle.cjs',external:['bufferutil','utf-8-validate'],logLevel:'warning'}).then(()=>{const fs=require('fs');let b=fs.readFileSync('generated/baileys-bundle.cjs','utf8');b=b.replace(/parsedUrl\.protocol === \"https:\" \? await import\(\"https\"\) : await import\(\"http\"\)/g,'parsedUrl.protocol === \"https:\" ? require(\"https\") : require(\"http\")');fs.writeFileSync('generated/baileys-bundle.cjs',b);console.log('Baileys bundled + patched');}).catch(e=>{console.error(e.message);process.exit(1)})"
scripts.build: npm run bundle:baileys && npx --package=@yao-pkg/pkg pkg . --compress GZip --output release\laundry-app.exe && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& 'C:\Program Files (x86)\Inno Setup 6\ISCC.exe' /DAppVersion=%npm_package_version% installer\laundry.iss"
